title: melicope vitiflora
intro: Melicope vitiflora, also known as the Mountain Papaya or Island Barwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is native to Hawaii and is a shrub or small tree that grows up to 6 meters tall. The medicinal properties of Melicope vitiflora include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Melicope vitiflora have been used to treat fever, cough, and digestive issues, and have also been used to support immune system health and reduce inflammation, but further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
